title: Fossils and Archeology Loading Backgrounds
description: New Loading backgrounds from the Fossils and Archeology Mod!
body:
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fossils-and-archeology-loading-backgrounds)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fossils-and-archeology-loading-backgrounds)

[![youtube-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/youtube-plural_vector.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/@Kesselspacks)
[![kofi-singular-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/donate/kofi-singular-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
[![website](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/documentation/website_vector.svg)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
# Overview
If you love the Fossils and Archeology Mod and want to change that boring old background into something more interesting, use this Fossils and Archeology Loading Backgrounds Resourcepack. Change the default dirt loading screen into a vibrant array of different dinosaur previews.

# Important
1. The **Loading Backgrounds Mod** is required for this to work.

## [Resourcepack Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/39e1d151-f787-4346-9014-f14dc996f94e.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
